caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary. The screen is split into two sections: on the left, an older man wearing a red cap and glasses is speaking into a microphone, likely a host or commentator. On the right, there is a smaller inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. The headline at the bottom reads "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu," suggesting that the discussion revolves around a statement made by Bola Tinubu, a prominent Nigerian political figure. The setting indicates a live broadcast, with viewers encouraged to watch online through the provided website link. The overall tone suggests a serious and analytical discussion on current political affairs in Nigeria.
